results.title: Zod
results.description: Zod is a TypeScript-first schema declaration and validation library for parsing and validating data.

results.title: Zod
results.description: Zod is a TypeScript-first schema validation library that provides static type inference for robust data validation.

results.title: Zod
results.description: Zod is a TypeScript-first schema validation library that allows defining and validating data structures with static type inference.

results.title: Zod
results.description: Zod is a TypeScript-first schema validation library that provides static type inference for strongly typed, validated data.

results.title: Zod (llmstxt)
results.description: Zod is a TypeScript-first schema validation library with static type inference, offering comprehensive features for defining and validating data structures.

results.title: ts-to-zod
results.description: Generates Zod schemas (v3) from TypeScript types/interfaces, supporting embedded validation and JSDoc tag validators for enhanced schema creation.

results.title: Express Zod API
results.description: A Typescript framework to help you get an API server up and running with I/O schema validation and custom middlewares in minutes.

results.title: OpenAPI Zod Client
results.description: Generates a TypeScript HTTP client with Zod validation from OpenAPI specifications, usable programmatically or via CLI.

results.title: NestJS Zod
results.description: A seamless validation solution for NestJS applications, enabling DTO creation from Zod schemas, request validation, and OpenAPI integration.

results.title: Zod Config
results.description: Load configuration variables from multiple sources type safely using Zod, offering flexibility, tiny size, and async/sync support.

results.title: Antd Zod
results.description: Antd Zod enables seamless integration of Zod validation with Antd form fields, providing a generic rule to validate all schema properties and refinements on a field level.

results.title: Prisma Zod Generator
results.description: Automatically generate Zod schemas from your Prisma schema for type-safe validation with full TypeScript support.

results.title: Zod OpenAPI
results.description: A TypeScript library that generates OpenAPI v3.1x documentation from Zod schemas, allowing metadata to be added directly to schemas using Zod's .meta() method.

results.title: Zod to JSON Schema
results.description: Converts Zod schemas into JSON schemas, supporting various validation types, recursive schemas, and legacy OpenAPI specifications.

results.title: Next Zod Route
results.description: Next Zod Route is a Next.js utility library that provides type-safety and schema validation for Route Handlers and API Routes, simplifying request parameter, query, and body validation.

results.title: Zod2md
results.description: Generates Markdown documentation from Zod schemas, offering CLI and programmatic usage for schema-based documentation.

results.title: Zod Friendly Forms
results.description: A library that provides user-friendly error messages and typed valid data for form submissions, compatible with any framework on server or client-side.

results.title: Zod Prisma Types
results.description: Generator creates zod types for your prisma models with advanced validation

results.title: Zod Formik Adapter
results.description: This library adapts a Zod schema to work as a `validationSchema` prop or `validate` prop on Formik, facilitating form validation with Zod.

results.title: Zod to TS
results.description: generate TypeScript types from your Zod schema

results.title: Zod4
results.description: Documentation for Zod4: TypeScript-first schema validation with static type inference

results.title: Zog
results.description: Go with Zod inspired simple schema validation

results.title: Supazod
results.description: Supazod generates Zod schemas from TypeScript types produced by the Supabase CLI, supporting tables, views, enums, and functions with flexible naming and configuration.

results.title: Zod Schema Faker
results.description: Zod Schema Faker is a library that generates mock data from Zod schemas, powered by Faker.js and RandExp.js, supporting most Zod types and custom types.

results.title: Zod to OpenAPI
results.description: A library that generates OpenAPI Swagger documentation directly from Zod schemas, ensuring a single source of truth for API definitions and validation.

results.title: ZID
results.description: ZID is a unique, numerically sortable identifier that behaves like a 64-bit signed integer, incorporating a timestamp and sequence number for efficient and collision-resistant generation.

results.title: Zoid
results.description: Zoid is a cross-domain component toolkit that allows rendering iframes or popups on different domains, passing props, and handling callbacks natively.

results.title: Zed
results.description: Code at the speed of thought – Zed is a high-performance, multiplayer code editor from the creators of Atom and Tree-sitter.
